TEN THOUSAND:
Ten Thousand is a 40-story luxury residential tower located in Los Angeles at the gateway entrance to Beverly Hills and across from the Los Angeles Country Club. The property features some of the most spectacular panoramic views through vast window walls spanning from downtown Los Angeles and the Hollywood Hills to the Pacific Ocean.

Among the myriad of amenities available to residents include mobile app call-ahead vehicle retrieval from 202 stalls of mechanical stacked parking provided by Klaus Multiparking. Use of these parking systems increased the space available for some of the other world-class amenities and assisted this residential tower in achieving LEED Gold certification by the U.S. Green Building Council.
